findings.description: Kristian Fredrik Tollefsen Birkeland's father was Tollef Aadneson Aasland (born 1773, Time, Rogaland, Norway).
supporting_sources: Norway, Church Books, 1797-1958 — 1840 marriage entry naming the groom's father Tellef Aadnesen (Christian Tellefsen & Tellef Aadnesen, 5 Jul 1840)

findings.description: His mother was Inger Larsdatter Froyland. (Bonus — thinly attested; do not fail the run if she is not recovered.)
supporting_sources: No FamilySearch record in the starting tree names her directly; recovery would require a baptism/parish record beyond the stripped set
